INC-00001.resolution: Increase memory limit allocation in Helm chart to 4Gi

INC-84730.symptom: 504 Gateway Timeout: Upstream connection timed out in api-gateway for pod gateway-pod-123
INC-84730.resolution: Investigate the health and connectivity of services upstream from `gateway-pod-123` in the `api-gateway` namespace, as `gateway-pod-123` appears to be running normally according to logs.
